cards.front: What is the maximum length of a file name in Unix?
What characters are allowed in a Unix file name?
Can Unix file names contain spaces?
Can Unix file names contain special characters?
cards.back: Some special characters are allowed, such as underscores and period (.)

cards.front: What is the purpose of the '.' and '..' in Unix file names?
cards.back: The '.' represents the current directory, while '..' represents the parent directory
